form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start ran on from midfield and won by 1.3 len at Sirinyer All Weather March 27 over 1200m defeating Canim Citir with 58.5kg at $2.10. The run before that 3rd in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on March 20 over 1400m, 1.2 len behind Emir Ilyas carrying 60kg at $11.50. Impressed last start and can go on with it.
